title:
PENTHOUSE GROOVE NEW DJ VIDEO🎧
【spring high】

seventh heaven fusion & latin jazz

今回は「TATA VASQUEZ AND HIS ORCHESTRA - SUITE GUARACHO PART 2」から「Spirit Of Truth · Emanuel K. Rahim · The Kahliqs 」への繋ぎのシーンをお届け。
春の暖かみを連れてきてくれるようなリズミカルな楽曲をお楽しみください。

This time, we’re sharing a transition scene from “Tata Vasquez and His Orchestra – Suite Guaracho Part 2” into “Spirit Of Truth – Emanuel K. Rahim & The Kahliqs.”

Enjoy these rhythmic tracks that bring a warm, spring-like feeling.
